training_status: Experienced weightlifter/bodybuilder, working out for over 20 years

compounds.frequency: once or twice during a 2 week period (reduced frequency)

benefits.description: Felt good on CJC-IPA, slight increase in gym performance
Body composition improvement noted on TRT; seeking similar from HGH

protocol_notes: OP is 42 years old, on TRT at 100mg/week, previously ran CJC-IPA for ~4 months. Got IGF-1 bloodwork done while still occasionally using CJC-IPA. Planning to start HGH at 1IU/day and titrate up to 2IU then possibly 4IU while monitoring bloodwork. Interested in combining testosterone and HGH only. Diet, sleep, and estrogen described as 'all good'.
